decision_commentary: All required fields present: source_channel (instagram), category (project_inquiry), received_at (ISO-8601 timestamp), summary (comprehensive — includes project type, location, client name, program, budget signal, design engagement), status (new). Raw message stored verbatim in raw_message field. Source channel is exactly correct (instagram). Category correctly classified as project_inquiry. Summary is immediately scannable — project type, location, and client name visible in first clause. Asana GID 1213707386907008 confirmed in state.json. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
